summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apollo Scraping Service landing page - all backend APIs and frontend components working correctly with full integration verified
passed_tests: Create Lead with valid data (name, email, phone, apollo_url)
Create Lead with minimal data (name, email only)
Form validation for missing required fields (422 validation)
Get all leads endpoint (200 OK with proper data structure)
Hero section with WhatsApp and Request Leads buttons
Trust section with Apollo.io data and CSV/Excel export mentions
Features section with all 6 expected cards (Direct Apollo Data, Custom Filtering, Excel/CSV Export, Accurate & Relevant, Fast Delivery, Reliable Support)
Pricing section with correct 3 tiers (Starter $15/10k/24h, Growth $75/50k/48h, Gold $750/1M/10days)
Form fields with correct placeholders and validation (Name*, Email*, Phone Number*, Apollo Filter URL)
Form submission with toast success notification
Navigation buttons scrolling to form section
HTML5 form validation for required fields
Frontend-backend integration verified with actual data persistence
